title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Supreme Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
